'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 67''' was the sixty-seventh issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 9]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Escape of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]]
*[[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]]
*[[Nomi Sunrider]]
*[[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]] Characters
*[[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] - [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|Asteroid Belt]]
*[[PackTrack 41LT-R|Mule Droid]]
*[[Foreign Intruder Defense Organism]] (FIDO)
*[[Sonic pistol|Sonic Weaponry]]
*Manufacturers
